note: Pure-prior forecast, no chart input. Filler image attached but instructed to ignore.
regime_read: Persistent bullish expansion week — 5 straight green RTH sessions, repeated close-near-high, every meaningful pullback absorbed. Late week shifted slightly from pure trend to trend-then-balance, not bearish reversal.

same_dow_reference.summary: opening weakness failed, V-reversal led to all-day staircase trend up

time_window_expectations.10am: early direction test, likely reclaim/confirmation phase rather than final high if session opens soft
time_window_expectations.12pm: constructive pullback or shelf, important support test
time_window_expectations.2pm: resume higher if trend intact, otherwise balance not full reversal
time_window_expectations.4pm: close in upper half, moderate chance of near-high settlement

probable_goat.rationale: noon pullback/reclaim continuation long — cleanest entries on prior Mon/Thu, consistent with buy-weakness regime

tactical_bias.invalidation: sustained acceptance below opening washout low OR failed reclaim after first pullback OR noon selloff that doesn't recover

confidence_notes: Biggest risk: exhaustion after 5 straight up sessions. If Mon opens with failed continuation and sellers achieve acceptance below early support, forecast could be wrong — model is leaning on prior-week persistence and same-DOW reversal continuity rather than evidence of fresh downside control.
